summary: Record the bounded aggregate verification after wiring AI viewer screenshot context: 171 files and 1266 tests pass.

decisions.decision: Run one aggregate suite after screenshot context crossed Workbench, viewer, and AI panel seams; stop while green.
decisions.rationale: Focused tests, lint, build, and provenance were green; this single aggregate run falsifies regressions without a repeated test loop.

testEvidence.criterion: Existing application behavior remains green after the AI screenshot context addition.
testEvidence.test: Run the complete Vitest suite once after the screenshot context commit.

red.outcome: No red run was required; focused UI/AI tests, lint, and production build were green before this bounded aggregate.

green.outcome: GREEN: 171 test files passed and 1266 tests passed in 19.64s.

questions: Provider-secret redaction review, UI agent-mode/tool-handler wiring, auto-apply policy, and hosted AC-10.c/d evidence remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
